headline: Assessing Halliburton (HAL) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Analyst Targets And DCF Signals A Wider Discount
summary: Key context for Halliburton stock now Halliburton (HAL) continues to attract investor attention, with the stock recently closing at $41.22. The company sits at a market value of about $34.3b, supported by its two core operating segments. Completion and Production generated revenue of $12,678, while Drilling and Evaluation contributed $9,491. This reflects Halliburton’s broad exposure to global oilfield services across the United States, Latin America, the Middle East and Asia, and other...
